calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Codi Dada for Olivia Sentonoi (petitioner) (via zoom).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 14, 2025 is admitted to probate. Olivia Sentonoi is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 14. 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
